pi_items.source: Direct HTTP request verification - site returns HTTP 200 and is publicly accessible
Standard image file extension formats verified against web standards
Verified on crawler-test.com: /status_codes/status_404 returns HTTP 404, /status_codes/status_403 returns HTTP 403
Verified against setup_task.sh which creates this directory path

privileged_info_summary: The task uses https://crawler-test.com/, a real public website designed for testing web crawlers and SEO tools. The task requires identifying broken image assets (files with extensions .jpg, .jpeg, .png, .gif, or .webp) that return client error status codes (404 or 403) from this site. All metadata claims regarding the target URL, expected image file extensions, expected HTTP status codes, and export directory have been verified against the actual website and configuration files.
